ideation: This sequence aims to depict reverence and respect, fitting the symbolism of the Khanda. The animation will feature a slow, deliberate raising of both arms, palms together, culminating in a pose of prayer or supplication.  The movement should be graceful and controlled, emphasizing the significance of the symbol. In the first frame, the arms start at the sides, slightly below shoulder height.  In the second frame, the arms begin to rise, palms facing inward, moving in a smooth, upward arc. By the third frame, the arms are nearly at their highest point, with the palms almost touching. The final frame shows the arms raised, palms together in a gesture of prayer or respect. The slight variations in joint angles and wrist positions add to the fluidity of the motion.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, a moment of quiet anticipation
both arms slowly rise, palms turning inward together
arms ascend further, hands nearing a central point
hands meet in prayerful reverence, raised high
